pages.text: Infrastructure has 4 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:infra_core_t1, kubejs:infra_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:infra_core_t1$() gates: storagedrawers:oak_full_drawers_1, sophisticatedstorage:barrel, ironchest:iron_chest
$(li)$(item)kubejs:infra_core_t2$() gates: storagedrawers:controller, sophisticatedstorage:controller, sophisticatedbackpacks:backpack
$(li)$(item)kubejs:infra_core_t3$() gates: buildinggadgets2:gadget_building, buildinggadgets2:gadget_exchanging
$(li)$(item)kubejs:infra_core_t4$() gates: buildinggadgets2:gadget_copy_paste, buildinggadgets2:gadget_destruction
